headline: Carney 🏒🇨🇦 SWEEPS 👑 By-Elex TRIFECTA for THICC Majority 🍑📈‼️
text:
Mark Carney 🏒💼, the BANKER BOSS turned CANUCK PM 🇨🇦🍁, just DROPPED the MIC 🎤🍆 on haters after LIBERALS 🚀 snagged a SLIMMAJ MAJORITY 🏆📊 in THREE by-elections MONDAY NIGHT 🌙💥! Voters be like 'TRUST THE PLAN 🧠📈' – Liberals now HOLDIN' 174/343 SEATS 💺🔒, no more BEGGIN' opposition simps 🤡 for crumbs! Carney flexin' HARD 😤: 'Canadians TRUST our VIBE ✌️, we accept with HUMILITY & DETERMINATION 💪🍑!' Poilievre 🍁🐸 CRYIN' salty tears 🧂😭, callin' it 'POWER GRAB via DEFECTIONS 🏃‍♂️💨 – no accountability, backroom DEALS 🤝🕵️!' But Carney's crew LAUGHIN' 😂, poachin' 5 OPPOSITION FLAKES (4 Cons + 1 NDP cuck 🐔) over 5 months, now WHISPERIN' more MPs to CROSS THE FLOOR 🕺➡️🔴!

By-elex BANGERS 💣: Toronto's Scarborough Southwest 🏙️ & University-Rosedale 📚 (vacated by Blair UK HIGH COMMISH ✈️🇬🇧 & Freeland UKRAINE ADVISOR 🇺🇦🧠), plus Quebec's Terrebonne FIGHT 🥊 where Tatiana Auguste 👩‍💼 edged it by ONE VOTE LAST TIME 🍆📏 – Supreme Court tossed it over MAIL-IN BALLOT GOOF 🤦‍♂️📬, but she SLAYED again! Congrats to Doly Begum 👏, Danielle Martin 🩺 & Tatiana – 'STRENGTHENED DEMOCRACY at DECISIVE MOMENT 🇨🇦🔥!' Carney tweeted on X 🐦📱.

EPIC TURNAROUND 🤯: Liberals were DOOMED 😱 pre-Trudeau RESIGN 🏃‍♂️💨 in Jan '25 after nearly DECADE flop, but Carney HOCKEY-SKATED 🛼❄️ to MINORITY WIN in April '25 amid TRUMP'S AGGRO TARIFF TALK 🍊🇺🇸😡 – support SURGED like Tim Hortons line ☕🚀! FIRST TIME EVER in Canada: MAJORITY via BY-ELEX + DEFECTIONS COMBO 🌀👑 – Trudeau last did it in 2015 SWEEP 🧹, but got MINORITIED later 📉. Poilievre RAGE-TWEETING: 'Libs want us COMPLACENT 😴 so Carney DICTATOR MODE 👑🚫 – NAH, WE FIGHTIN' for CANADA 🇨🇦💥!' Media teasin' MORE FLOOR-CROSSERS comin' 👀🤝. Carney's got that MAGIC PUCK 🏒✨, dodgin' election till 2029 ⏳😏 – Poilievre seethin' like lost playoff Habs fan 😡🍁! Wall Street to Bay Street 🤑📈 lovin' the STABLE VIBES, Carney's PLAN got that GOAT ENERGY 🐐🔥!
